procedure.name: UpdatePortalPermsRec
procedure.text:
create or replace function UpdatePortalPermsRec(&&ObjId&& bigint) returns table(&&CurrentId&& bigint, &&ParentId&& bigint, &&CreationAuthor&& bigint)
as $$
with recursive t_Rec as ( select d.&&Id&&, d.&&Folder&&, d.&&CreationAuthor&& from &&PortalObject&& d where d.&&Id&& = $1 union all select dc.&&Id&&, dc.&&Folder&&, dc.&&CreationAuthor&& from &&PortalObject&& dc inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&Id&& = dc.&&Folder&& and dc.&&InheritPermissions&& = 1 )
select &&Id&& as &&CurrentId&&, &&Folder&& as &&ParentId&&, &&CreationAuthor&& from t_Rec
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: UpdateInheritPortalObjectPermissions
